sys_security_acl.description: Allow read access on ACTIVE x_taniu_tan_core_configured_sensor records for any users with any of the roles specified in the "requires_role" field. Also grants access to ALL users if the "requires role" field is blank on the Configured Sensor record. (A separate ACL (0cd39c49dbd61550acc1ef92ca961971) grants access to all users with the configured_action_manager and core_admin roles.)
sys_security_acl.name: x_taniu_tan_core_configured_sensor
